# Skill Downloads

把 GitHub 仓库链接发给你的 agent，并说“安装 multi-agent skill”。agent 应先阅读
`docs/agent-install.md`，再按客户端选择对应安装包。

## v0.1.5

| Package | 用途 | Size | SHA256 |
| --- | --- | ---: | --- |
| [codex-multi-agent-skill-v0.1.5.zip](codex-multi-agent-skill-v0.1.5.zip) | Codex 专用 skill，优先支持 Desktop 原生 subagent；handoff 与 Codex CLI 是兜底 | 98208 | `9bfdbf6dd1aa510ea33d54db705e3ab453cb58cd9259c02a3d303e9f3e9ede8d` |
| [cursor-multi-agent-pack-v0.1.5.zip](cursor-multi-agent-pack-v0.1.5.zip) | Cursor 专用 pack，包含 Desktop Agent prompt、Cursor rules 与 CLI launcher | 92059 | `bd4b4e34f135ea2453ffaa2803f900fdddf5988cbf3f87f02fa12378d6e03df6` |
| [claude-code-multi-agent-pack-v0.1.5.zip](claude-code-multi-agent-pack-v0.1.5.zip) | Claude 专用 pack，包含 Desktop/custom-skill prompt、`CLAUDE.md`、本地/ACP launcher | 92340 | `1754dc6b1a7a13916803f51a3b682d11770c8fca0bd5e682a938492afe9479cd` |
| [openclaw-multi-agent-skill-v0.1.5.zip](openclaw-multi-agent-skill-v0.1.5.zip) | OpenClaw/Her 专用 skill，包含 mission-control scripts | 61998 | `5ca230d5f9b9bc0a5ed9fc92c61a866602b8e90859453f76f6ee327212551f1d` |
| [multi-agent-coding-skill-v0.1.5.zip](multi-agent-coding-skill-v0.1.5.zip) | 通用协议包，只包含 skill 规则、模板、清单和端到端安装 demo | 35683 | `031d0c4c29ccc4d7bafdcae505ec945d7b852101fc3385d648480f9e7e4ab16d` |
